brief.speaker: pharaoh
brief.text: Find every delivery logged by the overseer named Weni. He has been my most reliable man for a decade. Let us see his work.

expected.sql: SELECT overseer, year, amount FROM granary WHERE overseer = 'Weni'

hints.text: Pharaoh: 'Too many entries. Weni was one man, not many.'
Pharaoh: 'That cannot be all of Weni's work. Check your comparison.'
Pharaoh: 'Your scribes are baffled. Text values need single quotes.'
Pharaoh: 'The filter must find the overseer whose name is Weni.'

success.speaker: pharaoh
success.text: Weni's records. Year after year. A good man. You may proceed.
